items.text: Locate Harmony Delegation setup form and install data builder.
Add validator address input for Harmony Delegation setup.
Encode validator address into installation params for Delegation only.
Provide basic validation and helper text for the input.
Ensure validator address syncs into form state on input change.
Surface prepare error details in the transaction dialog.
Normalize Harmony repo addresses to lowercase to avoid checksum errors.
Display Harmony Delegation short code (TDEL) in body info.
Add Harmony proposal settings (dates + snapshot block).
Register Harmony proposal/vote builders.
Use processKey as proposal prefix when defined.
Verify prepare installation succeeds with delegation validator address.
Summarize changes for UI testing.
Proposals appear in UI even when metadata is unavailable (placeholder/fallback)
Graceful degradation when backend API is down (no hard crashes)
Uninstall UX shows clear warnings and post-uninstall state
Plugin removal properly cleans up UI state (no stale entries)
Error messages are user-friendly and actionable
Loading states clearly indicate backend operations in progress
Network switching properly reloads plugin configurations
